brand.name: A1A1 (AQAS)
brand.tagline: Powered by 10 to the 4th power of agents
brand.footer_branding: A1A1 (AQAS) trademark branded by Duane Clevenger E.I.R technology

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter uppercase font-black
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight uppercase font-bold

typography.guidelines: Do not center align headings. Left-align text for technical reading. Use uppercase and wide tracking for overlines and technical telemetry data.

colors.guidelines: No purple gradients. Use tactical high-contrast amber for accents. Base backgrounds should be deep obsidian (tinted heavily towards cool slate). Use 1px sharp borders.

spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: Control Room Grid (Dense, structural, border-collapse look)
spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: p-6 to p-12 for containers. Dense padding for data cards.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned content. Asymmetrical bento grids with visible borders. Use Subgrid where possible.
spacing_and_layout.guidelines: Create a 'terminal look' by using grid lines between sections. Avoid rounded corners; use sharp edges or max 2px border radius. Expose the skeleton of the UI.

surfaces_and_borders.borders: 1px solid border-slate-800, often with border-collapse so elements share borders. Glow effects on active states via drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,176,0,0.5)].
surfaces_and_borders.shadows: Hard shadows or no shadows. Rely on 1px borders for separation. No soft diffuse shadows.

components.hero: Terminal-style command center. Split layout: Left side bold typography (H1), Right side live satellite/NDVI map visual overlay. Use a scanning radar animation overlay if possible.
components.buttons: Rectangular, sharp edges. Primary CTA: Amber background, black text, bold uppercase. Hover: Lighter amber. Secondary: Transparent with amber border, amber text.
components.cards: Flat background (#121418), 1px subtle border, no shadow. Monospace data readouts inside.
components.navigation: Sticky top bar, crystal glassmorphism (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md) with a hard bottom border-slate-800.
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (Duotone or Regular) or Lucide. Technical, minimal.
components.architecture_diagram: Rendered as a structural flow using monospace text and connected nodes, glowing amber active states.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.content: Logo A1A1 (AQAS), links to Systems, Ariah, Architecture, Waitlist, and primary CTA 'Initiate Sequence'.

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: H1: '10,000 AI AGENTS. ZERO BLIND SPOTS.', Subtitle: 'Powered by 10 to the 4th power of agents. Enterprise precision-agriculture and defense-grade operational intelligence.', CTA: 'EVERYTHING OVERSTEP OF ARIAH'. Visual: generated satellite_ndvi_map.

sections.name: AQAS AI Assistant
sections.content: Capabilities matrix: Recommendations, Irrigation Planning, Operational Alerts, Analytics Summaries. Display as a terminal console output window.

sections.name: Ariah Sales Engine
sections.content: Autonomous sales engine section highlighting Apollo, Instantly, HubSpot integration. Data flow visuals.

sections.name: Architecture Overview
sections.content: Architecture diagram: User -> Next.js -> API Layer -> AI Services + Database -> Satellite + Weather APIs -> Automation Systems. Visual: generated architecture_diagram.

sections.name: Stack Showcase
sections.content: Grid of technologies: Next.js, Supabase, OpenAI, Mapbox, Sentinel Hub, n8n, Vercel, Stripe. Use monospace labels and subtle glowing borders on hover.

sections.name: Roadmap
sections.content: Phased rollout roadmap (Week 1-4). Displayed as a vertical timeline or Gantt chart style with tactical waypoints.

sections.name: Lead Capture / Waitlist
sections.content: Form to join waitlist. Terminal input style. Minimalist inputs with sharp borders.

sections.name: Footer
sections.content: Stats / trust indicators. Text: 'A1A1 (AQAS) trademark branded by Duane Clevenger E.I.R technology'.

motion_and_interactions.hover: High contrast border color shifts (slate to amber). Fast transitions (0.15s).
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Fade in with slight upward motion. No bouncy easing. Linear or sharp ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.special_effects: Use a subtle CSS scanning line (repeating-linear-gradient) over the hero map visual for a radar/satellite effect.

image_urls.description: High-contrast satellite view of agricultural fields, NDVI mapping style, tactical defense UI overlay
image_urls.placement: Hero section right side or background with heavy dark overlay

image_urls.description: Abstract architecture diagram, server nodes glowing in tactical amber and obsidian
Aerial view of winding river through urban and natural landscapes
image_urls.placement: Subtle background overlay with high opacity reduction in data sections

image_urls.description: Aerial photography of field representing thermal/moisture mapping
image_urls.placement: AQAS AI Assistant or Moisture Zone section

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS and raw HTML (divs, sections, spans) for major layout blocks to achieve the exposed 'grid border' Palantir/defense look.
Do NOT use generic card shadows or rounded corners (keep it sharp, max rounded-sm).
Use 'border-collapse' style structures where neighboring div borders overlap.
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, forms, and interactive elements.
Use JetBrains Mono for all data readouts, labels, and small text. Use Chivo for large H1/H2 headings.
Never use purple gradients or soft UI elements. Stick to Slate/Obsidian, pure White, and Tactical Amber (#FFB000) for alerts/CTAs.
Install and use `lucide-react` for technical/minimal icons.
